docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF HASSAN,YEHYA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NG,SAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $845.87 FILED BY HASSAN,YEHYA AS TO DEFENDANT NG,SAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,145.87 FILED BY NG,SAM AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HASSAN,YEHYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASSAN,YEHYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NG,SAM DEFT WAS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $845.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NG,SAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HASSAN,YEHYA ADDITIONAL ATTY FOR PREPARATION OF SMALL CLAIMS CA SE UNNECESSARY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
